blended.narrative: Indianhead Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.3 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,929 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
